description: The xRegistry model for the RubyGems wrapper, describing the structure and metadata for Ruby gem registries and packages.

rubyregistries.description: A group representing a Ruby gem registry provider (e.g., rubygems.org).

packages.description: A Ruby gem in the registry, including its metadata and available versions.

name.description: The canonical name of the Ruby gem.

gem_uri.description: Direct download URL for the latest gem.

downloads.description: Total download count across all versions.

version_downloads.description: Download count for the latest version.

platform.description: Build platform of the latest version.

sha.description: SHA-256 checksum of the latest gem file.

dependencies.description: Runtime and development dependencies keyed by type.

versions.description: Published builds of a Ruby gem, one per unique version+platform combination.

number.description: Raw version string as published to RubyGems.

prerelease.description: True if this is a pre-release version.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was published.

downloads_count.description: Download count for this specific version+platform.

gem_uri.description: Direct download URL for this gem file.

sha.description: SHA-256 checksum of this gem file.

yanked.description: True if this version has been yanked from RubyGems.
